title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: September 5, 2024
summary: September 5, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week but at a slightly greater rate of 4.78% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 4.75%), from the level on 08/29/2024 of 4.577 M km 2 to 4.358 M km 2 for this week. For this time of year, we are now essentially still tied f...
